column1: #   L_*    = loop stems. Cell = "<vol>@<sec>" (e.g. 80@4 = ramp to 80 over 4s).
#            Blank = no change for that stem this cue.
#            First non-blank cue per stem starts it playing; later cells just re-target volume.
#   OS_*   = one-shots. Cell = "<vol>@<sec>" to fire (e.g. 80@2 = fire at vol 80
#            Shorthand: "100" or "1" = fire at full volume

column3: All but D fade in low
